title: SpawnerLock
description: Prevent players from broking others' spawners and view placed spawners
body:
HOW TO USE PLUGIN?

There is nothing you should do.

On first installing. The plugin will add all players to database (After this process, The plugin will automatically set First-Setup to false in config.yml but you had better check it)


And you can also set op players can break spawners or not in config.yml

When a player tries to break someone else's spawner. Plugin will block.

Note: Only new placed spawners,after the plugin installed, will be protected 

You can enable Transfer Spawners in config.yml

Commands:

- /spsetowner <playername> : With this command, a player can transfer a spawner to an another player (Player command, permission is SpawnerLock.setowner)
 
- /spsetowneradmin <playername> : With this command, an admin can transfer a spawner to an another player (Admin command, permission is SpawnerLock.setowneradmin)
  
- /spinfo : With this command, you can learn whose this spawner is (By default admin command, permission is SpawnerLock.spinfo)
- /spuser : With this command, you can see all players who placed a spawner, how much spawner these players placed and where these spawners are in gui (Admin command, permission is SpawnerLock.spuser)
  
Note: you have to look at a spawner while executing these commands (Except for /spuser)
